backstory.original: Nerys Kathon joined the Heroes of Baldur's Gate on a mission to protect her church, but was soon pulled into a harrowing journey to Barovia and beyond. As a cleric of Kelemvor, she grew up in service to the dying and the dead and developed a cold detachment to anything outside of duties to her faith. Beneath that frosty exterior is a loyal and caring adventurer, but it's a side she rarely shows to anyone outside her closest friends.
backstory.display: 妮莉丝·卡松加入了博德之门的英雄们，肩负着保护她教会的使命。但很快，她被拉进了前往巴洛维亚和其他地方的艰难旅程。作为克兰沃的牧师，她在为垂死和已死之人服务的过程中成长起来，并对她信仰职责之外的一切形成了冷漠的疏离。在冰冷的外表下，是一位忠诚而富有爱心的冒险家，但她很少向最亲密朋友以外的人展示这一面。

description.original: Nerys cleaves all targets near the closest enemy. Undead enemies take an additional 5 seconds worth of BUD damage.
description.display: 妮莉丝顺劈距离最近的敌人附近的所有目标。亡灵敌人额外受到 5 秒基础杀招伤害。

description.original: Nerys blasts all enemies, reducing their damage and increasing party damage.
description.display: 妮莉丝冲击所有敌人，降低其伤害并提升队伍伤害。

longDescription.original: Nerys leaps into the field, unleashing a halo of divine energy. It hits all enemies and decreases their damage done by 50% while increasing the damage the party does by 300%. These effects last 30 seconds.
longDescription.display: 妮莉丝飞进战场，释放一个神圣能量光环。光环会命中所有敌人并降低 50% 敌人造成的伤害，同时还会提升队伍造成的伤害 300%。这些效果会持续 30 秒。

description.desc: Nerys calls her Spiritual Weapon to her side. It attacks on her attack timer, dealing $(target)'s base damage with a $(amount)% bonus. Spiritual Weapon attacks can set BUD (crediting Nerys).
妮莉丝召唤灵能武器来到她身边。它依据她的攻击计时器发动攻击，造成$(target)的基础伤害，以及 $(amount)% 的加成。灵能武器攻击可以设置基础杀招伤害（计入妮莉丝）。

tipText.original: Nerys's Spiritual Weapon deals bonus damage when it attacks.
tipText.display: 妮莉丝的灵能武器在攻击时造成额外伤害。

description.desc: When Nerys' Spiritual Weapon attacks, Nerys targets the column with the most damaged Champion and heals all the Champions in it for $(amount) health.
当妮莉丝的灵能武器发动攻击时，妮莉丝瞄准受伤最严重的勇士所在的纵队，并使其中所有勇士恢复 $(amount) 点生命值。

tipText.original: Nerys heals Champions in a column whenever her Spiritual weapon attacks.
tipText.display: 每当灵能武器攻击时，妮莉丝都会治疗同列的勇士。

description.desc: Undead enemies become Nerys' Favored Foe and take $(amount)% increased damage from all Champions.
亡灵敌人成为妮莉丝的偏好对手，所有勇士对其造成的伤害提高 $(amount)%。

Nerys' Spiritual Weapon follows the Champion with the highest damage instead of her. It attacks on that Champion's attack timer, dealing damage based on their damage instead of Nerys'. If those attacks are BUD-setting, then the Champion it is following gets credit for setting the BUD.
妮莉丝的灵能武器跟随伤害最高的勇士，而非她自己。它根据该勇士的攻击计时器发动攻击，并根据该勇士的伤害造成伤害，而非妮莉丝的伤害。如果这些攻击是基础杀招伤害设定，则它所跟随的勇士将作为基础杀招伤害设定者。
Increases the effect of War Healing by $(amount)%

specializationDescription.original: Nerys focuses on healing damaged Champions
specializationDescription.display: 妮莉丝专注于治疗受伤的勇士

description.desc: Increases the damage bonus of Spiritual Weapon by $(amount)%

specializationDescription.original: Nerys focuses on her Spirtual Weapon
specializationDescription.display: 妮莉丝专注于她的灵能武器

description.desc: Increases the damage of Spiritual Weapon against all Favored Foes by $(amount)%
“灵能武器”对所有偏好对手的伤害提高 $(amount)%

specializationDescription.display: 妮莉丝专注于偏好对手

description.desc: When $first_effect_key_target attacks, $target's companion also attacks for $amount% of $first_effect_key_target's damage
$first_effect_key_target攻击时，$target的伙伴同时进行攻击，伤害值为$first_effect_key_target伤害值的 $amount%

description.original: Must I save that big buffoon and his hamster yet again?
description.display: 我还得再救一次那个大傻瓜和他的仓鼠吗？

description.original: For Baldur's Gate and the Sword Coast!
description.display: 为了博德之门和剑湾！

description.original: My attacks give life, in a way.
description.display: 我的攻击给予生命，某种意义上来说。

description.original: Kelemvor smiles upon you, friend.
description.display: 克兰沃在向你微笑，朋友。

description.original: They now know what it means to meet the Heroes of Baldur's Gate!
description.display: 他们现在明白了，碰到博德之门的英雄们意味着什么！

description.original: I see you yourself are quite intelligent.
description.display: 我能发现你相当聪明。

description.original: Sometimes the fates have other things planned.
description.display: 有时候命运就是如此出乎意料。

description.original: My friends and my faith sustain me.
description.display: 我的朋友和我的信仰支撑着我。

description.original: Your existence is anathema, foul undead!
description.display: 你的存在令人厌恶，肮脏的亡灵！

description.original: All roads lead to Kelemvor.
description.display: 条条大路通克兰沃。

description.original: A sturdy blade is all I need.
description.display: 我需要的就是一把结实的剑。

description.original: Minsc isn't the only one who can swing a greatsword!
description.display: 不是只有明斯克才挥得动巨剑的！

description.original: I have devoted all I have to the Lord of the Dead.
description.display: 我将我的一生奉献给亡者之主。

description.original: Death comes to all. Until it's my time, I will do Kelemvor's will.
description.display: 死亡人人平等。在我的大限来临之前，我会继续贯彻克兰沃的意志。

description.original: One would be fool hearty to head into battle without the proper protection.
description.display: 没有做好防御准备就贸贸然冲进战场的都是莽夫。

description.original: It has protected me against blades and arrows.
description.display: 这护甲替我格挡过无数刀剑和箭矢。

description.original: Some say the skull is unnerving. For me, it's a comfort.
description.display: 有人认为这个骷髅太吓人了。但对我来说却是非常暖心。

description.original: My faith sustains me. My friends give me reasons to fight on when all seems lost.
description.display: 我的信仰即是我的食粮。是我的兄弟们在我万念俱灰时助我重燃了斗志。

description.original: The darkness surrounding my eyes strikes fear in those I fix with my stare.
description.display: 我双眼周围的黑暗会将恐惧植入每一位胆敢跟我对视的人的眼中。

description.original: Just make sure it's cooled first. You only make that mistake once.
description.display: 记得确保这些煤炭碎已经凉快下来了。不要再犯上一次的糊涂。

description.original: It took me quite a while to find a mixture that stays on during the heat of battle.
description.display: 花了我九牛二虎之力才找到了这种可以在战斗中经久不散的颜料。

description.original: I save this eyeshadow for the right occasion.
description.display: 这种眼影是为特殊的情况所准备的。

description.original: I used to not care as much about my cloak. Then we landed in the tundra.
description.display: 我向来都不太在意自己的斗篷。但这一次我们是来到了冻土地带。

description.original: I trust Kelemvor will protect me until it is time for me to pass into his care.
description.display: 我相信在我的大限降临之前，克兰沃会一直守护着我的。

description.original: The beast that supplied the fur has gone onto Kelemvor. I thank it for it's sacrifice.
description.display: 这张皮的主人已经回到了克兰沃的怀抱。我感激它的牺牲。

description.original: With the correct gear, the Heroes of Baldur's Gate can weather any storm.
description.display: 只要衣着恰当，没有任何风暴可以阻挡博德之门的英雄们前进的步伐。

description.original: I cracked it fighting a wave of undead. It reminds me to never let my guard down.
description.display: 我在对战一群亡灵时弄破了它。现在它时刻提醒着我要永远保持警惕。

description.original: How many people were comforted by this on their way to the Lord of the Dead?
description.display: 有多少人在回归亡者之主的怀抱途中见识过此神迹？

description.original: The scales, like most things in life, must be balanced. Death comes for us all.
description.display: 这些鳞片就跟生活中的大部分事物一样，都必须均衡和谐。死亡人人平等。

description.original: The gold used to make this symbol could have been put to use in better ways.
description.display: 此象征所使用的黄金更适合用于别的用途。

description.original: It was found among priceless relics of the Kelemvor faith. It was not of Toril.
description.display: 这是我在一堆克兰沃的珍贵遗物中找到的。这不是托瑞尔星球的本土产物。

description.original: The mists that carried us to Barovia are somehow tied to this locket.
description.display: 将我们送往巴洛维亚的迷雾似乎跟这个吊坠有关联。

description.original: This locket has protective energy, but more research is required to unlock its power.
description.display: 此吊坠上蕴含着保护性能量，但需要继续琢磨方可解锁其能力。

description.original: A soul that couldn't pass on saved us from the vampire. I hope his soul now rests.
description.display: 一个不得安息的灵魂将我们从吸血鬼口中救了出来。希望他现在可以安息了。

effects.description: Increases the damage of all Champions by $amount%
Increases the damage of all Male Champions by $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)% for each Human Champion in the formation
Increases the damage of all Champions with a STR score of 15 or higher by $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions with a DEX score of 11 or higher by $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Melee Champions by $(amount)%

character_sheet_details.backstory: Nerys Kathon joined the Heroes of Baldur's Gate on a mission to protect her church, but was soon pulled into a harrowing journey to Barovia and beyond. As a cleric of Kelemvor, she grew up in service to the dying and the dead and developed a cold detachment to anything outside of duties to her faith. Beneath that frosty exterior is a loyal and caring adventurer, but it's a side she rarely shows to anyone outside her closest friends.
character_sheet_details.system_description: Nerys uses her Spiritual Weapon to buff the party and her War Healing to keep it alive.

character_sheet_details.backstory: 妮莉丝·卡松加入了博德之门的英雄们，肩负着保护她教会的使命。但很快，她被拉进了前往巴洛维亚和其他地方的艰难旅程。作为克兰沃的牧师，她在为垂死和已死之人服务的过程中成长起来，并对她信仰职责之外的一切形成了冷漠的疏离。在冰冷的外表下，是一位忠诚而富有爱心的冒险家，但她很少向最亲密朋友以外的人展示这一面。
character_sheet_details.system_description: 妮莉丝使用灵能武器为队伍提供增益，她的战争治疗能保证队友存活。

display.name: 战争治疗

original.name: Kelemvor's Heal
original.specialization_description: Nerys focuses on healing damaged Champions

display.name: 克兰沃的治愈
display.specialization_description: 妮莉丝专注于治疗受伤的勇士

original.name: Kelemvor's Will
original.specialization_description: Nerys focuses on her Spirtual Weapon

display.name: 克兰沃的意志
display.specialization_description: 妮莉丝专注于她的灵能武器

display.name: 克兰沃的敌人
display.specialization_description: 妮莉丝专注于偏好对手

display.name: 敏锐思维

original.name: Demonic Ichor

display.name: 恶魔脓水
display.description: 他们现在明白了，碰到博德之门的英雄们意味着什么！

original.name: Celestial Blessing

display.name: 天界赐福
display.description: 有时候命运就是如此出乎意料。

original.name: Faith and Fury
original.description: My friends and my faith sustain me.

display.name: 信仰与愤怒
display.description: 我的朋友和我的信仰支撑着我。

original.name: Judge of the Dead
original.description: Your existence is anathema, foul undead!

display.name: 亡者审判
display.description: 你的存在令人厌恶，肮脏的亡灵！

original.name: Prodigal Leader
original.description: All roads lead to Kelemvor.

display.name: 浪荡首领
display.description: 条条大路通克兰沃。

original.name: Aging Greatsword
original.description: A sturdy blade is all I need.

display.name: 老化的巨剑
display.description: 我需要的就是一把结实的剑。

original.name: Agile Blade
original.description: Minsc isn't the only one who can swing a greatsword!

display.name: 敏捷之刃
display.description: 不是只有明斯克才挥得动巨剑的！

original.name: Holy Warrior's Greatsword
original.description: I have devoted all I have to the Lord of the Dead.

display.name: 神圣战士巨剑
display.description: 我将我的一生奉献给亡者之主。

original.name: Blessed Greatsword of Kelemvor
original.description: Death comes to all. Until it's my time, I will do Kelemvor's will.

display.name: 克兰沃的神圣巨剑
display.description: 死亡人人平等。在我的大限来临之前，我会继续贯彻克兰沃的意志。

original.name: Rusty Breastplate
original.description: One would be fool hearty to head into battle without the proper protection.

display.name: 腐蚀的胸甲
display.description: 没有做好防御准备就贸贸然冲进战场的都是莽夫。

original.name: Worn Breastplate
original.description: It has protected me against blades and arrows.

display.name: 磨损的胸甲
display.description: 这护甲替我格挡过无数刀剑和箭矢。

original.name: Adamantine Breastplate
original.description: Some say the skull is unnerving. For me, it's a comfort.

display.name: 精金胸甲
display.description: 有人认为这个骷髅太吓人了。但对我来说却是非常暖心。

original.name: Breastplate of the Devout Cleric
original.description: My faith sustains me. My friends give me reasons to fight on when all seems lost.

display.name: 虔诚牧师的胸甲
display.description: 我的信仰即是我的食粮。是我的兄弟们在我万念俱灰时助我重燃了斗志。

original.name: Dark Eyeshadow Components
original.description: The darkness surrounding my eyes strikes fear in those I fix with my stare.

display.name: 黑暗眼影部件
display.description: 我双眼周围的黑暗会将恐惧植入每一位胆敢跟我对视的人的眼中。

original.name: Crushed Charcoal Eyeshadow
original.description: Just make sure it's cooled first. You only make that mistake once.

display.name: 碎煤眼影
display.description: 记得确保这些煤炭碎已经凉快下来了。不要再犯上一次的糊涂。

original.name: Shea Nut Butter Eyeshadow
original.description: It took me quite a while to find a mixture that stays on during the heat of battle.

display.name: 乳木果油眼影
display.description: 花了我九牛二虎之力才找到了这种可以在战斗中经久不散的颜料。

original.name: Arrowroot Eyeshadow
original.description: I save this eyeshadow for the right occasion.

display.name: 竹芋粉眼影
display.description: 这种眼影是为特殊的情况所准备的。

original.name: Patched Together Cloak
original.description: I used to not care as much about my cloak. Then we landed in the tundra.

display.name: 拼凑的斗篷
display.description: 我向来都不太在意自己的斗篷。但这一次我们是来到了冻土地带。

original.name: Fur Cloak
original.description: I trust Kelemvor will protect me until it is time for me to pass into his care.

display.name: 毛皮斗篷
display.description: 我相信在我的大限降临之前，克兰沃会一直守护着我的。

original.name: Wolf Fur Cloak
original.description: The beast that supplied the fur has gone onto Kelemvor. I thank it for it's sacrifice.

display.name: 狼皮斗篷
display.description: 这张皮的主人已经回到了克兰沃的怀抱。我感激它的牺牲。

original.name: Cloak of the Wolf
original.description: With the correct gear, the Heroes of Baldur's Gate can weather any storm.

display.name: 野狼斗篷
display.description: 只要衣着恰当，没有任何风暴可以阻挡博德之门的英雄们前进的步伐。

original.name: Cracked Kelemvor Symbol
original.description: I cracked it fighting a wave of undead. It reminds me to never let my guard down.

display.name: 破裂的克兰沃象征
display.description: 我在对战一群亡灵时弄破了它。现在它时刻提醒着我要永远保持警惕。

original.name: Ancient Kelemvor Relic
original.description: How many people were comforted by this on their way to the Lord of the Dead?

display.name: 远古的克兰沃遗物
display.description: 有多少人在回归亡者之主的怀抱途中见识过此神迹？

original.name: Holy Symbol of Kelemvor
original.description: The scales, like most things in life, must be balanced. Death comes for us all.

display.name: 神圣的克兰沃象征
display.description: 这些鳞片就跟生活中的大部分事物一样，都必须均衡和谐。死亡人人平等。

original.name: Ostentatious Symbol of Kelemvor
original.description: The gold used to make this symbol could have been put to use in better ways.

display.name: 华丽的克兰沃象征
display.description: 此象征所使用的黄金更适合用于别的用途。

original.name: Ancient Locket
original.description: It was found among priceless relics of the Kelemvor faith. It was not of Toril.

display.name: 古老的盒式吊坠
display.description: 这是我在一堆克兰沃的珍贵遗物中找到的。这不是托瑞尔星球的本土产物。

original.name: Barovian Locket
original.description: The mists that carried us to Barovia are somehow tied to this locket.

display.name: 巴洛维亚盒式吊坠
display.description: 将我们送往巴洛维亚的迷雾似乎跟这个吊坠有关联。

original.name: Locket of Protection
original.description: This locket has protective energy, but more research is required to unlock its power.

display.name: 保护之盒式吊坠
display.description: 此吊坠上蕴含着保护性能量，但需要继续琢磨方可解锁其能力。

original.name: Sergei's Soul Bound Locket
original.description: A soul that couldn't pass on saved us from the vampire. I hope his soul now rests.

display.name: 谢尔盖的缚魂吊坠
display.description: 一个不得安息的灵魂将我们从吸血鬼口中救了出来。希望他现在可以安息了。

使所有勇士的伤害提高 $amount%
Increases the damage of all Male Champions by $(amount)%
使所有男性勇士的伤害提高 $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)% for each Human Champion in the formation
阵型中每有一位人类勇士，所有勇士的伤害提高 $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions with a STR score of 15 or higher by $(amount)%
使所有力量大于等于 15 的勇士伤害提高 $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions with a DEX score of 11 or higher by $(amount)%
使所有敏捷大于等于 11 的勇士伤害提高 $(amount)%
